content: AutoGPTQ and AutoAWQ are both deprecated (2025). GPTQModel (ModelCloud, v7.0.0 by April 2026) is the actively maintained successor, supporting GPTQ/AWQ/GGUF/EXL3/FP8 and many backends (vLLM, SGLang, HF Transformers, ROCm, Metal, Ascend NPU). It adds CPU kernels (AVX2/AVX512, INT8 CPU). For HF Transformers integration, GPTQModel has fully supplanted AutoGPTQ/AutoAWQ.
